---
image: cover.png
repo-actions: false
sidebar: false
search: false
---

## Hamel Husain

![](images/hamel.png){width=80 .profile-pic style="float:left;margin-right:1.25rem;margin-bottom:0.5rem"}

[Hamel Husain](https://hamel.dev){target="_blank"} is a machine learning engineer and educator with over 25 years of experience. He has worked with innovative companies such as Airbnb and GitHub, which included <a href="https://openai.com/index/introducing-text-and-code-embeddings#:~:text=models%20on%20the-,CodeSearchNet,),-evaluation%20suite%20where" target="_blank">early LLM research used by OpenAI</a> for code understanding. He has also led and contributed to numerous popular [open-source machine-learning tools](https://hamel.dev/oss/opensource.html){target="_blank"}.

## Shreya Shankar

![](images/shreya.png){width=80 .profile-pic style="float:left;margin-right:1.25rem;margin-bottom:0.5rem"}

Shreya builds systems for AI-powered data processing. She holds a PhD in Computer Science from UC Berkeley and, in 2027, will join Carnegie Mellon University as an Assistant Professor of Computer Science. Shreya created [DocETL](https://github.com/ucbepic/docetl){target="_blank"}, an open-source system for analyzing unstructured text at scale, deployed across journalism, law, medicine, policy, finance, and urban planning. [Her research](https://www.sh-reya.com/){target="_blank"} has been published at top computer science venues including VLDB, SIGMOD, and UIST (including a Best Paper award), and has influenced systems at Snowflake, BigQuery, LangChain, and OpenAI. Before her PhD, Shreya worked as a ML and data engineer at startups. She holds a BS in Computer Science from Stanford University.

## Isaac Flath

![](images/isaac.png){width=80 .profile-pic style="float:left;margin-right:1.25rem;margin-bottom:0.5rem"}

[Isaac Flath](https://isaacflath.com/){target="_blank"} is an AI engineer and educator who has spent the last decade building AI products with startups and larger companies. His work centers on the systems that make AI products reliable in production — retrieval, evals, memory, tool calling, traces, and agent workflows. He also runs the [AI Product Engineering Club](https://www.skool.com/ai-eng){target="_blank"} and teaches widely followed courses on RAG and AI-assisted coding.

## Antaripa Saha

![](images/antaripa.jpeg){width=80 .profile-pic style="float:left;margin-right:1.25rem;margin-bottom:0.5rem"}

[Antaripa Saha](https://antaripasaha.com/about){target="_blank"} is a machine learning engineer focused on search, retrieval, agents, and evals.  She has worked with multiple early-stage AI startups as a consultant, helping design and build production AI systems and do applied research across retrieval, evaluation, memory, and LLM fine-tuning.
